name: Kraft 3-step Cranberry Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages of Fat-Free Cream Cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2. Add eggs; mix just until blended. Do not overbeat after adding eggs.
3. Stir in 1/4 cup of the cranberries and orange peel.
4. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with non-stick cooking spray. Sprinkle the bottom with crumbs.
5. Pour the cream cheese mixture into the prepared pie plate.
6. Sprinkle the remaining cranberries on top.
7. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes or until the center is almost set. Cool. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
Makes 10 servings.
Per Slice: Calories 180 Fat 2.5g Prep: 10min | bake 45min | chill 3 to 24hrs
